rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Recover Attorneys Fees And Costs Incurred In Post-Arbitration Judicial Proceedings In The Trial Court And To Amend Judgment

PETITIONER METREON INC.'S ,( FORMERLY KNOWN AS SRE SAN FRANCISCO) MOTION To Recover Attorneys Fees And Costs Incurred In Post-Arbitration Judicial Proceedings In The Trial Court And To Amend Judgment IS GRANTED.
